course/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.5 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Add Spring Data JPA starter to enable JPA repository support.
Add H2 in-memory database driver for runtime use.

.gitignore.general_idea: Replaced a minimal, likely Eclipse-specific .gitignore with a comprehensive template covering Maven, STS, IntelliJ, NetBeans, VS Code, and environment files.
.gitignore.human_impl: Replaced content with standard Spring Initializr .gitignore template

course/src/main/resources/application.pr.general_idea: Explicitly enable the Open Session in View pattern to ensure lazy-loaded entities are accessible during view rendering, a common requirement in Spring Boot applications.
Activate the 'test' Spring profile to load test-specific configurations, likely for development or testing environments.
